user.title: Add an Inspire Piazo ceiling light
user.description: An RFXCOM RFXtrx integration must already be configured. The remote code identifies one paired ceiling light; use a different code for each light.

data_description.name: Name displayed for this ceiling light.
data_description.remote_code: Four hexadecimal digits from the 24-bit remote command (F120 for a command such as F12001).

error.invalid_remote_code: Enter exactly four hexadecimal digits, for example F120.
error.rfxtrx_not_configured: Configure the RFXCOM RFXtrx integration before adding this ceiling light.

abort.already_configured: A ceiling light with this remote code is already configured.
